full_text:
Lady Cao of Deyang 曹夫人德陽鄉主
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Cao of Deyang (曹夫人德陽鄉主). Sister to Cao Zhen and mother of Xiahou Xuan and Xiahou Hui. Lady Cao of Deyang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
